context._comment_orcid: ORCID OIDC (FR-27) durable config so EVERY deploy (manual + cd.yml auto cdk-deploy) wires it — was -c-flag-only, which made a context-less deploy silently REVERT ORCID (client_id -> '', secret unwired). client_id is public (embedded in the auth URL); secret_arn is a reference (the secret value stays in Secrets Manager).
